{{Infobox location
| name = Vesper
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Vesper]] is a planet floating beneath [[Suriel]] and [[Ozriel]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c24">''Dreadgod'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Vesper]] is a central planet.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c1">''Waybound'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Daruman]] is expected to emerge from [[Vesper]] victorious.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Vesper]] is an [[Iteration]] surrounded by [[the Mad King]]'s working.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Otherworldly locations]]
